title: Kung Pao Chicken Hash
description: A spicy Chinese-inspired dish made with chicken, hash, and a variety of vegetables in a savory sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the scallions, garlic, and ginger to the skillet and cook until the scallions are softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the hash to the skillet and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the Szechuan peppercorns and Szechuan sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Kung Pao chicken hash hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
